name: Funnel Cake I
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Milk, or more as needed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, salt, soda, sugar, and baking powder.
2. In another bowl, blend the beaten egg and milk (or more as needed).
3. Combine the dry ingredients with the wet ingredients until smooth.
4. Heat oil in a skillet or pan to 375°F (190°C).
5. Fill a clean funnel with batter, covering the small end with your finger.
6. Carefully place the filled funnel into the hot oil.
7. Slowly lift your finger away from the funnel's hole, allowing batter to flow into the oil and form patterns.
8. Fry until golden brown, about 1-2 minutes, turning once with two spatulas.
9. Remove the funnel cake to paper towels to drain excess oil.
10. Place on a plate and sprinkle with powdered sugar.
11. Repeat steps 5-10 until all batter is used.
